_comment: Active splash animation set + render params. Single source of truth for the pipeline (make_wrappers.py -> capture_frames.mjs -> frames_to_data.py -> gen_splash_header.py). 'group' is the authoritative rate-bucket tier — one of "idle", "normal", "active", "heavy" (matching the usage-rate tiers in firmware/src/usage_rate.cpp). It is propagated through manifest.json into splash_anim_def_t.group in the generated header; splash.cpp maps it to a rate-group index via RATE_TIERS. Source SVGs vendored in ./svg/ (MIT, marciogranzotto/clawd-tank).
